use_cases: Interactive knowledge assessments for educational platforms and online courses
Product onboarding quizzes to test user understanding of features
Training module assessments with real-time feedback on answers
Gamified learning experiences with star ratings and trophy rewards
Workplace compliance training with progress tracking indicators
ai_summary: An interactive quiz component with state management for tracking user answers and displaying real-time visual feedback. Features correct/incorrect answer indicators (check circles and X circles), a completion trophy, and star rating system. Built with Tailwind CSS for clean, flat visual styling, managing quiz flow through React useState hooks for an engaging assessment experience.
